General & Cosmetics Dental Treatment

  • Hours 1.3 - 2
  • Start at $50

General and cosmetic dental treatments cover a wide range of services aimed at maintaining oral health.

Learn More

Surgical Treatment & Tooth Extraction

  • Hours 1 - 2
  • Start at $99

Surgical dental treatments involve procedures that go beyond routine dental care and specific dental issues.

Learn More

Dental Implants & Prosthodontics

  • Hours 1 - 1.4
  • Start at $60

Dental implants and prosthodontics are closely related fields in dentistry, working together to restore.

Learn More

Compassionate Patient-Focused Oral And Maxillofacial Care

At The Big Grin Dental Service, we believe that a healthy and beautiful smile is a gateway to confidence, well-being, and a vibrant life. Established with a passion for precision dentistry and patient-centered care, our clinic is dedicated to providing comprehensive dental solutions.

  • Night and weekend appointment
  • Routine and emergency services
  • Short time wait and Luxury amenities
  • About Our Hospital
  • Dr. Tommy Ludvig
    Founder & CEO

Enjoy Specialized Dental Services

We take pride in offering comprehensive general dentistry services to ensure the overall health & well of our patients.

View All Services

Book For Consultation

Covering Your Smile: Unveiling Our Dental Insurance Options

We're all for convenience and confidence, not on cost. Get on-demand teeth cleanings for just $149. No drills, judgment, or surprise treatments, ever.

Our mission it to provide quick & convenient teeth cleanings and whitenings without breaking the bank. If you don't have dental insurance, simply book an appointment online and pay at the end of your visit.

  • 10 Dental Cleanings
  • 2 Panoramic X-ray
  • 5 Fluoride Treatments
  • Set Of Diagnostics

Insurance Accepted

Our Clients Review

“I recently had the pleasure of visiting The Big Grin Dental Service for a dental check-up, and I couldn't be more impressed. From the moment I walked in, the friendly and welcoming staff set the tone for a positive experience.”

Brooke Sullivan

“I've been a patient at The Big Grin Dental Service for several years now, and the exceptional care keeps me coming back. Dr. Cameron Stone and the entire team consistently deliver excellence in dental services.”

Allison Hayes
